input.name: name
input.t-attf-class: form-control o_website_form_input #{'name' in required_fields and 'is-invalid' or ''}
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'name' in predefine_data and predefine_data['name'] or partner_id and 'name' in partner_id and partner_id['name']

input.name: email
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'email' in predefine_data and predefine_data['email'] or partner_id and 'email' in partner_id and partner_id['email']

input.name: phone
input.t-attf-class: form-control o_website_form_input #{'phone' in required_fields and 'is-invalid' or ''}
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'phone' in predefine_data and predefine_data['phone'] or partner_id and 'phone' in partner_id and partner_id['phone']

input.name: street
input.t-attf-class: form-control o_website_form_input #{'street' in required_fields and 'is-invalid' or ''}
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'street' in predefine_data and predefine_data['street'] or partner_id and 'street' in partner_id and partner_id['street']

input.name: street2
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'street2' in predefine_data and predefine_data['street2'] or partner_id and 'street2' in partner_id and partner_id['street2']

input.name: zip
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'zip' in predefine_data and predefine_data['zip'] or partner_id and 'zip' in partner_id and partner_id['zip']

input.name: city
input.t-attf-class: form-control o_website_form_input #{'city' in required_fields and 'is-invalid' or ''}
input.t-att-value: predefine_data and 'city' in predefine_data and predefine_data['city'] or partner_id and 'city' in partner_id and partner_id['city']

option.t-att-selected: predefine_data and 'country_id' in predefine_data and predefine_data['country_id'] and int(predefine_data['country_id']) == c.id or partner_id and 'country_id' in partner_id and int(partner_id['country_id']) == c.id

input.name: partner_id
input.t-att-value: partner_id or predefine_data and 'partner_id' in predefine_data and predefine_data['partner_id']

input.name: mode
input.t-att-value: mode or predefine_data and 'mode' in predefine_data and predefine_data['mode']
